const[activePage,setPage]=useState('feedback');const switchRole=()=>{const next=role==='hr'?'employee':'hr';setRole(next);setPage(next==='hr'?'forms':'feedback');};const renderPage=()=>{if(role==='hr'){if(activePage==='forms')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(HRFormsPage,{});if(activePage==='submissions')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(HRSubmissionsPage,{});if(activePage==='dashboard')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(HRDashboardPage,{});if(activePage==='cv-ranking')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(HRCVRankingPage,{});}else{if(activePage==='careers')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(EmployeeCareersPage,{});if(activePage==='feedback')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(EmployeeFeedbackPage,{});}return null;};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navbar,{role:role,activePage:activePage,onNavigate:setPage,onSwitchRole:switchRole}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("main",{children:renderPage()}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ToastContainer,{})]});}
